name: economizer-cool-down-phase
description: Hot day economizer check during evening window with indoor above comfort — enters cool-down phase

verdict.summary: Verifies economizer_check engages cool-down phase when eligible on a hot day

assertions.reason: hot day, outdoor=77 <= threshold(75+3=78), windows open, hour=18 in evening window, indoor=79 > comfort=75 → cool-down phase, target=comfort_cool=75
